element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns basic fighting mechanics and ranger moveset against scaled opponent before advancement

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Scenario Mode, second segment of each match
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: After defeating regular monster, player faces enlarged version requiring strategy adjustment and stamina management
Player faces increasingly difficult AI-controlled Rangers with varying movesets and strategies

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Unlocked after defeating Green Ranger in Scenario Mode
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: High-difficulty opponent becomes playable character, extending character roster and replayability

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Unlocked alongside Green Ranger after scenario completion
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Alternative giant form with distinct mechanics from standard Megazord

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Available from start; featured in late-game matches
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Giant transformation form used in final confrontations and available in Battle Mode

typical_tension_triggers: Progression to next opponent difficulty tier
Introduction of new ranger opponent with unfamiliar moveset
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Two-segment match structure creates cyclical tension-relief rhythm: initial moderate challenge (regular monster) followed by escalation (giant variant), repeating across scenario progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory matches against regular-sized monsters with single ranger, establishing core fighting mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating CPU opponent difficulty; giant monster variants introduce tactical complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: High-difficulty ranger opponents with advanced movesets; Megazord/Dragonzord transformations required
notable_spikes: Giant monster phase within each scenario match
Transition from monster opponents to skilled ranger CPU fighters
Green Ranger encounter and subsequent unlock
Final progression challenges requiring Megazord form

notable_level_patterns.description: Each Scenario Mode match divides into two distinct phases: player fights regular-sized monster as selected ranger, then immediately confronts enlarged variant of same opponent, creating escalation within single encounter
Green Ranger and Dragonzord remain inaccessible until defeated during scenario progression, forcing player to master available roster before accessing new options
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Scenario Mode completion triggers Green Ranger unlock

notable_level_patterns.description: Megazord and Dragonzord serve as late-game powerup options available in specific match contexts, providing mechanical refresh and power fantasy element
